---
title: "Killala Town Analysis"
description: "Group project analysing a small Irish town's economy and tourism potential, with data-driven recommendations to attract more visitors."
author: "Tanishq Katheriya"
date: 2025-10-01
image: "../images/killala.jpg"
categories: [Analytics]
---

## Overview

Group project (4–5 members). We researched and analysed Killala, a small town on the west coast of Ireland — examining its economy, tourism infrastructure, and demographics. We predicted future outcomes and suggested actionable strategies to attract more visitors and improve local quality of life. My role: data collection and presentation design.

## Tourist Footfall: Before and After Recommendations

The chart below models the projected increase in tourist numbers across key attraction types following our proposed interventions.

```{python}
#| label: fig-killala
#| fig-cap: "Projected tourist numbers before and after Killala recommendations"
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

categories = ['Heritage Sites', 'Coastal Walks', 'Local Events', 'Accommodation', 'F&B Venues']
before = [4200, 3800, 1500, 2100, 2800]
after  = [6800, 7200, 4300, 4900, 5600]

x = np.arange(len(categories))
width = 0.35

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 5))
bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, before, width, label='Before', color='#4a90d9', alpha=0.85)
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, after,  width, label='After',  color='#2ecc71', alpha=0.85)

ax.set_xlabel('Attraction Type')
ax.set_ylabel('Annual Visitors (estimated)')
ax.set_title('Killala Tourism — Projected Impact of Recommendations')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(categories, rotation=15, ha='right')
ax.legend()
ax.bar_label(bars1, padding=3, fontsize=8)
ax.bar_label(bars2, padding=3, fontsize=8)
ax.spines[['top', 'right']].set_visible(False)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Key Findings

- Heritage trail signage was the single highest-impact, lowest-cost intervention.
- Weekend event programming could triple local event attendance within two years.
- Accommodation capacity was the main bottleneck limiting overnight tourism.

## My Contribution

Data collection, literature review, and final presentation slides. I also built the projection model in Excel before visualising it here in Python.
